description: nFusion Solutions provides software and market-data products for precious-metals and bullion businesses, including real-time spot pricing, pricing automation, charts, and dealer integrations. Its public site describes a bullion business management platform and precious-metals data feeds.
summary: nFusion Solutions exposes one documented HTTP REST surface: the authenticated Market Data API at https://api.nfusionsolutions.biz with an OpenAPI spec; no public GraphQL, MCP, or CLI surfaces were found.
